title: Strangers Confess Their Love Through Love Letters
text: i love you i love you passionately genuinely and wholeheartedly like these are like more like happy tears i mean that was hard i don't really say stuff like that out loud oh man she'd be like i knew you liked me i don't know if she knew i like loved her i'm gonna take a picture right now hey so super random all right i sent it hey everyone today i'm here at the park and i'm inviting strangers to sit here and write a love letter to someone that they are either currently or were in the past secretly in love with after they write the letter they have the option of either sending the letter to the person that it's written to by selecting the envelope that says lover or they have the option of leaving it for another stranger to read by selecting the envelope that says stranger let's get started is there anyone in your life currently or maybe in the past who you were in love with but didn't tell them yes yes yes actually yes currently i'm i'm in love with someone what are you scared of uh expressing myself and kind of worried i might scare them away so the next step here is would you be willing to take your time and write them a love letter oh that's tough i think i can i think i can write about someone yeah okay yeah write it in here yeah write it in there so it's like as if i'm writing to him yes exactly i'm shaking like this is so intense is this going to be public like this letter it might be so that it depends on the next step okay all right i'll say dear this was the first love of my life i would

title: Strangers Confess Their Love Through Love Letters
text: like i'm more than special i have something to tell you that i've been too chicken to tell you [Music] i love you i love you passionately genuinely and wholeheartedly and i hope i hope for the very best in our possible future together love olivia [Music] every night i dream of you and i i've seen you grow and your love has been a raft and a raging abyss that is my life you are my definition of love you are the reason i made promises to god to be the best version of myself but now that our time has passed i fear specters will haunt my dreams of what could have been so i wish you love life and the happiness that you truly deserve one that leaves you breathless exhausted satisfied and satiated a love like you have given me you heard the earth the oath that i sing to the stars and that will always remain true so please claim your kingdom and walk this earth as the goddess that you are you will always find me where i always am forever in your heart and in the stars watching over you as you sleep in this life and the next love cole [Music] all right dear you probably knew this at the time but i was madly in love with you i didn't have the courage to tell you because deep down i knew you didn't feel the same way there were moments when you would be affectionate towards me and those times became an absolute addiction i craved more but the more i wanted the more you pulled away it was painful to hear you talk about the older guys you were attracted to i was completely and utterly in the friend zone but i was too young and naive to walk away [Music] i wish then i told you how title: Strangers Confess Their Love Through Love Letters

what i'm as i'm saying so i'm gonna say i'm gonna take a picture right now all right [Music] i'm kind of nervous all right i sent it yeah live did it live baby let's go yeah i think i'll pass on the the writing the letter but i'm happy to read one so dear someone dear you dear reflection to the woman i once loved my dear secret woman my one and only love of my life although you do not know that you are the first time i met you i knew there she is a seed was planted a seed of inspiration love and energy but you are running in a different field shopping in a different store swimming in another lake so i get pour my heart out and in this poem and it will in my heart be forever yours i loved you too early or maybe too late you in this lifetime was never my fate i treasure you darling and surely i pray that next time around you feel the same way yours forever i think it's amazing that someone could so intensely want another person and it not be returned or maybe it was returned at one point but now it's not but so much yearning i think it's sweet i don't know yeah i guess i can't understand because that's kind of how i was after my relationship ended and when i wasn't expecting it to um but yeah no i i get this this reaching for someone that is not there and that is it hurts although it's been 20 years since we last met i can still smell your perfume on my body when i rested my head on your shoulder it felt like the most secure place in the world as if nothing can harm me i knew then that it was too good to be true and we could never be together forever but i was thankful that i got to spend all those moments with you i know you're safe in some part of the world i know you are happy i look at your pictures on social media seeing you with age with time makes me feel like i'm living life with you i never thought anyone could love someone so deeply despite being apart but i do and nothing really matters not even distance call me crazy but i even love the people you're with now i'm so blessed to have known you to have loved you not many people get to love someone like that [Music] my dearest love i write to you today with the heart heavy and aching i write what for years i could not bring to my tongue i have loved you helplessly since the first time you smiled at me your hand and mine is all i have yearned for i have gone to the mosque not to meet god but you i have stayed hours after class not to study but to see you i have prayed all night not for myself or my family but you your happiness and your health i have prayed for a small glimpse of you to see me it saddens me that i will only get to kiss your lips in heaven i do not need the rivers of honey and lavish cushions and comfort we are promised i just want to be in your arms i love our faith but your husband and my husband will never know the bond we had people saw us and said they are sisters more than best friends oh how they were wrong how they didn't know i died inside for you i hope actually i imagine that you love me too that you imagine me joking with you when we are alone as i do it's odd to say but i hope you remember my perfume it's selfish to say but my love i am waiting for you my husband asked me why sometimes i randomly get sad how can i tell him that a small minimal task i did reminds me of you how can i tell him that i have loved you more than myself please remember me i will not ask you to love me back but please know in this world there's a woman that would leave her whole world for you that's really what makes me so sad i just like i kind of know what she means like being [Music] like stuck between religion and like what you actually feel like i grew up in a religious household and i was always kind of like felt like feelings towards women were wrong or like feelings that i may have had towards women were wrong so it definitely like it kind of hits me to see someone else writing about it because like i know what that feels like to like have to hide that part of yourself even if you like wish you wish anything like that you could show people that i feel like i could never be open with my parents about it because i know how they feel about it i don't know it's definitely it's it's heartbreaking because i don't know just no one deserves to like have to hide who they love from anyone else thank you thank you [Music] hey
